Over 20 years of experience in event ticketing. Learn more

Sell with South Africa's biggest experience marketplace

Join thousands of event organisers who trust Webtickets to sell tickets for their events, festivals, theatre productions, race entries, and much more. With over 20 years of experience and the lowest fees in SA, we're your partner in your event's success.

Everything you need to sell tickets successfully

Get your event live in minutes with our intuitive platform. No technical knowledge required.

Pricing

SA's Lowest Event Ticketing Fees

We've spent 20+ years perfecting our platform with SA's biggest entertainment providers. Choose the plan that fits your needs.

Essential

3.9% commission on sales

Everything you need to start selling fast. No complicated set up, just quick and easy ticketing for your event.

  • Quick and easy set up
  • Live sales reports
  • Simple scanning
  • WhatsApp Sales
  • Issue comps
  • Live client support

RECOMMENDED

Premium

Custom pricing

Access advanced features and tools with the expert assistance of your personal account manager.

Best for: Seasoned events, festivals, seating plans, tourism & attractions, race entries

  • Everything in Essential, plus:
  • Appointed relationship manager
  • Webtickets marketing campaigns
  • Advanced Dashboard access
  • Advanced seating plans
  • Custom integrations
  • Priority support
  • Tourism & Attraction ticketing
  • Race entries management
